suppress.notes: Suppression of PostgreSQL JDBC vulnerabilities. CVE-2024-1597 is mitigated by using version 42.7,4+ and ensuring secure connection string configurations.
Spring Security 6.4.2. Current reported CVEs do not apply to our specific stateless JWT authentication architecture.
H2 Database is used EXCLUSIVELY for local testing and development environments. It is never deployed in production, neutralizing the risk of CVE-2022-45868.
